charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_0500_: I was so focused, I didn’t notice!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_0600_: Huh? Was I arguing with Lucario?
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_0800_: I was trying to feel what Lucario feels!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_0900_: I call it, “Guess Which Hand the Berry’s In”!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_1000_: All right! I think I got it!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_1300_:
Looks like sensing your feelings will take
more practice, huh.
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_1400_: Trying to cheer me up? Thanks, Lucario!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_1500_:
Lucario’s always encouraging me and
getting me out of tough spots.
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_1600_:
Ever since he was a Riolu, he’s connected
with my aura and matched my rhythm.
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_1700_: Wait, have I told you this before?
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_0401_1900_:
Oh, duh! We DID talk about this,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_0402_2100_:
Oh, really? Well, I’m glad we could
talk, then!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_2200_:
Anyway, even after evolving into Lucario,
he’s still just as understanding and
supportive!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_2300_:
I felt like my bond with Lucario couldn’t
possibly get deeper.
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_2400_:
But once I awakened my arc suit, I realized
just how much lies ahead!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_2700_: So, to further deepen our bond...
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_2800_:
I wanted to see if I could sense Lucario’s
feelings, like he does mine.
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_2900_: But it seems I need more training.
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_3000_:
It’s frustrating, but I’ve got to stay positive!
After all, it just means I have to try harder!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_3100_:
My bond with Lucario will keep getting
stronger!
charaepi_ch0012_90_corni/2301_1201_3200_: Just watch as we evolve even further!
